headline: DailyPay Recognized by Everest Group as the Leader in Earned Wage Access
summary: Everest Group has named DailyPay the highest-scoring provider in its 2026 U.S. B2B Earned Wage Access (EWA) Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment, recognizing the company as the leader in Market Impact, Vision, and Capability.

raw.headline: DailyPay Recognized by Everest Group as the Leader in Earned Wage Access

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $414
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $411 to $414.
